name: Unsubscribe channels
fullName: Explore Channel listing page: Unsubscribe channels

steps.name: Given user logs in as "pankaj.joshi@kpoint.com" with password "admin_password"
When user navigates to "Channels" section of Explore
When user unsubscribes and verifies from the following channels
